xBRIEFInfo.author: agent:cursor
xBRIEFInfo.description: Scope xBRIEF for migrating xBRIEF artifacts 0.6 -> 0.8 and clearing legacy vbrief/ drift

plan.title: Migrate xBRIEF artifacts to schema 0.8 and clear legacy vbrief/ drift

narratives.Overview: Bring the xBRIEF data plane up to date with the current framework (Deft v0.82.0, which ships only xbrief-core-0.8.schema.json). Two gaps: (1) every xBRIEF artifact (all files under xbrief/ plus PROJECT-DEFINITION.xbrief.json) still declares xBRIEFInfo.version '0.6' while the 0.8 core schema requires the const '0.8'; (2) deft verify:xbrief-drift (#2109) flags three files still tracked under the deprecated top-level vbrief/ lifecycle directory (vbrief/.eval/doctor-state.json, vbrief/.eval/summary-history.jsonl, vbrief/DEPRECATED.md). Resolve both so the artifacts validate against xbrief-core-0.8 and the drift check passes, without regressing the converged layout marker that deft migrate:xbrief relies on.
narratives.Requirements: FR-1: Every xBRIEF artifact declares xBRIEFInfo.version '0.8' and validates against xbrief/schemas/xbrief-core-0.8.schema.json (fix any structural deltas beyond the version field, if the schema requires them). FR-2: The three legacy vbrief/ drift tokens are resolved so deft verify:xbrief-drift passes — remove the per-machine legacy .eval state files from tracking, and handle vbrief/DEPRECATED.md via the canonical route (keep + documented allow-list exception, or remove) without un-converging the layout. FR-3: The pending housekeeping-xBRIEF active/->completed/ rename is included so the working tree ends clean. NFR-1: Required CI check no-mixed-core-and-app passes and the PR merges via merge-commit convention. NFR-2: deft verify:xbrief-drift and any xBRIEF conformance gate report clean afterward.

items.title: Bump xBRIEFInfo.version 0.6 -> 0.8 across all artifacts and validate against xbrief-core-0.8 schema
Resolve the 3 legacy vbrief/ drift tokens (remove legacy .eval state; handle DEPRECATED.md canonically)
Land as a single migration PR with required CI green; leave working tree clean
